title: Earth Hour — The Stars Remember
description: A meditative, interactive starfield that dims the world for Earth Hour — petals fall through darkness, constellations breathe, and the clock counts the hour of silence.

title: Signal/Noise — Dispatches from March 28
description: A glitchy, reactive broadcast wall — flickering headlines scroll through noise and static, reacting to your cursor like a live news signal breaking apart at the seams.
